current_entry.author: Yitebeier Aikebaier
current_entry.description: Private proof of existence for your notes. Hash locally, anchor to Bitcoin via OpenTimestamps, verify offline. Your content never leaves your machine; only a hash is published. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
